title: What Politics Is
shortSummary: Understand what politics actually means — the allocation of power, resources, and values in society. Move beyond cynicism to see politics as the mechanism through which communities make collective decisions.
whyItMatters: Every law, tax, public service, and right you have exists because of politics. Understanding what politics is — and isn't — is the foundation for participating in or leading democratic society. Without this grounding, everything else is just noise.
coreConcepts: Politics as the allocation of power and resources
The social contract and why governments exist
